UniTrade
● testnet
Swap

Trade tokens peer-to-peer over Sphere's bearer-asset rails — no mempool, no gas auction.

Balance: —
Balance: —
Rate—
Network fee~0.0001 UCT (anchoring only)
SettlementAtomic, peer-to-peer
Sphere's public SDK exposes wallet identity and P2P payments natively. A dedicated on-chain swap/AMM endpoint isn't yet published in the developer docs — this panel is wired to a swapAdapter stub (see code) so you can drop in a DEX contract or UniTrade's swap endpoint the moment it ships.
Bridge

Move value between Unicity L1 (UCT) and connected networks.

→
Balance: —
Est. arrival—
Bridge fee0.1%
Cross-chain transfer here is wired to a bridgeAdapter stub. Unicity's published SDK handles native L1 token sends and identity directly — for external chains, point the adapter at your bridge contract/relay (e.g. a lock-mint or canonical bridge) once selected.
UniTrade Assistant
Hi — I'm wired into this dApp's swap and bridge logic. Ask me how a trade will execute, what a bridge transfer costs, or what's happening with your connected wallet.
